scenario_A.notes: Methods within Executor are directly contained. DefaultExecutor and StrictExecutor extend Executor. Limited blast radius due to class containment.

scenario_A_module.notes: Runtime module has 119 in-degree, widest blast radius in codebase. Changes here cascade to virtually all runtime consumers.

scenario_B.notes: ScopedVisitor has 42 out-degree (most dependencies of any AST class). Changes here cascade through cell compilation and dependency detection — 93 indirect impacts observed.

scenario_C.notes: DirectedGraph is the core data structure for dependency tracking. Changes ripple through the execution scheduler. 24 indirect impacts observed.

scenario_D.notes: UI plugins are leaf nodes with no reverse dependencies at the class level. 0 impacts is the expected/correct result — this validates that UCM correctly identifies isolated components.

scenario_E.notes: Cross-cutting utility with moderate blast radius. 10 indirect impacts — wider than UI plugins but narrower than runtime core.
